# didDisconnect

**Type Property**

The identifier of the message that posts after a stylus accessory disconnects from the device.

## Declaration

```swift
static var didDisconnect: NotificationCenter.BaseMessageIdentifier<GCStylus.DidDisconnectMessage> { get }
```
